title: stelis vesca
intro: Stelis vesca, also known as the Forest Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Stelis vesca include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Stelis vesca can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
